title: Teltonika RUT140 Industrial Ethernet Router
description: Teltonika RUT140 is a compact industrial Ethernet router, enhancing security through network isolation for end devices. Equipped with two Ethernet ports, DIN rail bracket, and an industrial 3-pin connector, it ensures seamless connectivity and easy installation. The router comes with RutOS , Wi-Fi 4, and supports industrial protocols such as Modbus, DLMS, DNP3, and OPC UA, and is compatible with RMS for efficient remote and on-site management Device 3-pin power connector QSG (Quick Start Guide) Packaging box
specsSearch: Wireless features Wireless frequency 2.4 GHz WiFi standards 802.11n, 802.11b/g Transmission speed - 2.4GHz [Mb/s] 450 Connectors and Interfaces WAN Ports 1 WAN speed (1) 10/100Mbps RF connectors (1) RP-SMA female LAN speed (1) 10/100Mbps Power Power type DC connector Max. power consumption [W] 2 Power via connector/terminal 9 .. 30V DC Physical characteristics Buttons Reset Operating temperature [°C] 40 up to 75 Weight [g] 142 Width [mm] 113 Height [mm] 25 Depth [mm] 69 Hardware CPU Mediatek, 580 Mhz, MIPS 24KEc CPU frequency [MHz] 580 Internal storage [MB] 16 RAM [MB] 128
